questions.question: Explain the mining process in Ethereum.

keyPoints: Advantages and disadvantages of each type

questions.question: What is Ethash and how does it work?
keyPoints: Ethash is a proof-of-work consensus algorithm
Modified version of the Keccak-256 hash function

questions.question: Explain the concept of mining pools and how they work.
keyPoints: Group of miners working together to mine Ethereum
Pool members contribute their computing power
Rewards are distributed among pool members
